---
title: Walk & Bike/Micromobility Summary
date: today
format: 
  html:
    mainfont: Poppins
    toc: true
    warning: false
    echo: false
    fig-width: 6
    fig-asp: .618
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(psrcplot)
install_psrc_fonts()
```

```{r load_data, include=FALSE}
source("walk_bike_data.R")
```

## Trips in Region

```{r trip_totals}
static_column_chart(trip_summary,
                  x = "survey_year", y = "est_rounded", fill = "survey_year",
                  ylabel = "# of Trips", xlabel = "Survey Year", title = "Total Trips in Region (in millions)",
                  dec = 1) + theme(
                    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                    plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                    )
```

```{r all_modes}
static_column_chart(filter(mode_summary, survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025") 
                           & !is.na(mode_class_5)),
                    x = "mode_class_5", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Mode", title = "Trips by Mode - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

## Walking and Bike/Micromobility Trips

```{r walk_estimate}
static_column_chart(filter(mode_summary, mode_class_5 == "Walk"),
                    x = "survey_year", y = "est", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "# of Trips", xlabel = "Survey Year", title = "Walk Trips - Estimate",
                    moe = "est_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

```{r bike_estimate}
static_column_chart(filter(mode_summary, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility"),
                    x = "survey_year", y = "est", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "# of Trips", xlabel = "Survey Year", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips - Estimate",
                    moe = "est_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

```{r walk_share}
static_column_chart(filter(mode_summary, mode_class_5 == "Walk"),
                    x = "survey_year", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Survey Year", title = "Walk Trips - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

```{r bike_share}
static_column_chart(filter(mode_summary, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility"),
                    x = "survey_year", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Survey Year", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

### Trips by Household Income

```{r walk_income_combined}
static_bar_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_income_combined, mode_class_5 == "Walk"
                        & hhincome_detailed_combined != "Prefer not to answer"
                        & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                 y = "hhincome_detailed_combined", x = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                 xlabel = "% of Trips", ylabel = "Household Income", title = "Walk Trips by Income (combined) - Share",
                 moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
                   axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                   axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                   legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                   plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                 )
```

```{r bike_income_combined}
static_bar_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_income_combined, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility"
                        & hhincome_detailed_combined != "Prefer not to answer"
                        & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                 y = "hhincome_detailed_combined", x = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                 xlabel = "% of Trips", ylabel = "Household Income", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips by Income (combined) - Share",
                 moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
                   axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                   axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                   legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                   plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                 )
```

### Trips by Race/Ethnicity

```{r walk_race}
static_bar_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_race, mode_class_5 == "Walk"
                        & !(race_simple %in% c("Child"))
                        & !is.na(race_simple)
                        & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                 x = "prop", y = str_wrap("race_simple"), fill = "survey_year",
                 xlabel = "% of Trips", ylabel = "Race & Ethnicity", title = "Walk Trips by Race - Share",
                 moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
                   axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                   axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                   legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                   plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                 ) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(20))
```

```{r bike_race}
static_bar_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_race, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility"
                        & !(race_simple %in% c("Child"))
                        & !is.na(race_simple)
                        & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                 x = "prop", y = str_wrap("race_simple"), fill = "survey_year",
                 xlabel = "% of Trips", ylabel = "Race & Ethnicity", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips by Race - Share",
                 moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                   axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
                   axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10),
                   axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                   axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                   legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                   plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                 ) + 
  scale_x_discrete(labels = scales::label_wrap(20))
```

### Trips by Age

```{r walk_age}
static_column_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_age, mode_class_5 == "Walk" 
                           & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                    x = "age_condensed", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Age Group", title = "Walk Trips by Age - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

```{r bike_age}
static_column_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_age, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility" 
                           & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                    x = "age_condensed", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Age Group", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips by Age - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

### Trips by Gender
```{r walk_gender}
static_column_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_gender, mode_class_5 == "Walk" 
                           & gender_group != "Prefer not to answer" 
                           & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                    x = "gender_group", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Gender", title = "Walk Trips by Gender - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```

```{r bike_gender}
static_column_chart(filter(walk_bike_by_gender, mode_class_5 == "Bike/Micromobility" 
                           & gender_group != "Prefer not to answer" 
                           & survey_year %in% c("2023", "2025")),
                    x = "gender_group", y = "prop", fill = "survey_year",
                    ylabel = "% of Trips", xlabel = "Gender", title = "Bike/Micromobility Trips by Gender - Share",
                    moe = "prop_moe") + theme(
                      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14),
                      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
                      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 16),
                      legend.text = element_text(size=14),
                      plot.title = element_text(size = 24)
                      )
```
